title: Lottery Educator
subtitle: Learn the true odds behind lottery games
description: Discover why lottery tickets are a statistical impossibility and understand the mathematics behind game probability.

features.interactiveGamesDesc: Simulate thousands of lottery draws to understand how long it really takes to win.
features.realStatisticsDesc: See the true odds and probabilities behind popular lottery games worldwide.
features.financialEducationDesc: Learn why understanding probability is crucial for personal finance decisions.
